message:
fix(storage): force memdb snapshot refresh after write transaction commit

After COMMIT, fsqlite's MVCC memdb snapshot could remain stale, causing
subsequent reads on the same connection to return pre-mutation values.
This manifested as auto-flush exporting status=open for issues that were
just closed, because the incremental export read the old snapshot.

Add a post-commit read probe (SELECT 1 FROM metadata LIMIT 1) that
forces fsqlite to detect the new commit sequence and refresh its memdb.

Fixes #204

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
